commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=28e20a7f3f5d3af638fa399dafdb0f9ef49dd68a)
commands.review_summary:
This PR expands the Docker/GHCR runtime image baseline and Compose settings, adds hosted config/update guards and compatibility behavior, emits ACP pre-agent hooks, and includes web-search, tool-error, and Telegram route fixes with tests.

Reproducibility: yes. for the blocking PR regression by source inspection: scripts/docker/setup.sh writes host OPENCLAW_* paths into .env, and PR-head docker-compose.yml imports that env_file without repinning those variables to /home/openclaw inside the services. I did not run a live Docker smoke in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: External PR proof is insufficient and the branch mixes Docker baseline/product policy with unrelated runtime fixes; automation cannot supply the contributor's real setup proof.
